recent.title: Westmore Beauty <> FERMAT | Launch Kick Off
recent.participants: Brenda Hernandez (bhernandez@westmorebeauty.com), Jessica Tennant (jtennant@westmorebeauty.com), Talia Cohen (talia@fermatcommerce.com), Pulkit Srivastava (pulkit@fermatcommerce.com), rruger@westmorebeauty.com
recent.summary: Talia and Pulkit held a launch kick-off with Westmore Beauty, where Jessica provided crucial feedback on the initial 62nd Eye Cream funnel, stressing the need for funnels to mirror their paid social landing page offers, including product bundles and upsells. FERMAT successfully connected Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Klaviyo integrations during the call.
action_items: Revise 60 Second Eye funnel to match paid social landing page structure
Stitch 1, 2, and 3 pack SKUs into a Virtual Product
Add Dual-Sided Brow Brush as GWP
Build Body Coverage Perfector '5 Reasons Why' funnel
Westmore to share brand kit (fonts, hex codes)

recent.title: Westmore Beauty <> FERMAT | Launch Kick Off
recent.participants: Brenda Hernandez (bhernandez@westmorebeauty.com), Pulkit Srivastava (pulkit@fermatcommerce.com), Ryan, Talia Cohen (talia@fermatcommerce.com), Jessica Tennant (jtennant@westmorebeauty.com), rruger@westmorebeauty.com
recent.summary: The initial Westmore Beauty launch kick-off focused on setup, addressing email deliverability, Google Analytics integration, and Shopify product imports. Jessica, Brenda, and Ryan shared key objectives including improving conversion for specific SKUs, increasing testing velocity, and maintaining AOV, with ROAS and CAC as primary success metrics.
action_items: Build skeptic-first advertorial for 60 Second Eye
Build concern-specific funnels for Body Coverage Perfector
Westmore Beauty to create video shops for both products

recent.title: Westmore Beauty x FERMAT Demo
recent.participants: Rae Prince (rae@fermatcommerce.com), Talia Cohen (talia@fermatcommerce.com), afriedson@guthy-renker.com, Daniel Chun (dchun@guthy-renker.com), Dan Joo (dan.joo@fermatcommerce.com)
recent.summary: Rae Prince and Talia Cohen demonstrated FERMAT's platform to Westmore Beauty's team, showcasing personalized landing pages, PDPs, and carts. The team was interested in the AI assistant Pierre and bundling/A/B testing features. Daniel Chun expressed strong interest but requested a 3-month opt-out clause for thorough testing.
action_items: Schedule separate deep-dive into A/B testing

calls.analysis: Westmore Beauty had an initial demo in October 2025 and two kick-off calls in February 2026. The brand's key contacts are Jessica Tennant (VP eCommerce & Growth), Brenda Hernandez, and Ryan Ruger. They are focused on conversion optimization for hero SKUs (60 Second Eye, Body Coverage Perfector) and are currently stalled due to a rebrand.

messages.text: Cross posting call update: Recap of 2/13 call. Confirming Slack invites reshared. Key action items for both teams outlined including 60 Second Eye funnel revisions and Body Coverage Perfector funnel build.
Westmorebeauty has removed themselves from this channel.
Confirming I've reshared access to them! LMK if that works or we can try something else
Talia Cohen can you please add us as members from the admin to YOUR channel as a guest? We don't use slack internally and are having issues accessing slack past a free trial period
Westmorebeauty has removed themselves from this channel.
Pre-call message: Ahead of our call tomorrow, please make sure integrations (Shopify, GA4, Meta) are completed at least 24 hours before our call.

slack.analysis: Westmore Beauty's Slack channel has been largely inactive since mid-February 2026. The brand team had Slack access issues (free trial limitations) and members have left/been removed from the channel multiple times. No messages from the brand since February 12, indicating the account has gone silent. This aligns with the rebrand that Jessica mentioned in email.

messages.subject: FERMAT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, Thanks for the update! I completely understand how rebranding can take precedence.

messages.subject: Re: FERMAT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13

messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, Thanks for the update! I completely understand how rebranding can take precedence. Just let me know when you're ready to dive back in.

messages.snippet: No i havent we have been knee deep in the rebrand which we will also need to update all creative to match.

messages.subject: Re: FERMAT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13

messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, Just wanted to follow up and see if you've had a chance to test out the updated funnels.

messages.subject: Re: FERMAT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13

messages.subject: Re: FERMAT <> Westmore Beauty | Call Recap 2/13
messages.snippet: Hey Jessica, As we discussed, I've updated the flows for both funnels based on your feedback.

messages.subject: Jessica Tennant and Pulkit Srivastava summary is ready
Prepare for Jessica Tennant and Pulkit Srivastava

email.analysis: Email thread shows a pattern of follow-ups from Pulkit with declining responsiveness from Jessica Tennant. Last substantive reply from Jessica (March 18) reveals the brand is deep in a rebrand, stalling FERMAT funnel work. Multiple follow-up emails sent on March 11, 16, and 18. Superhuman reminder triggered on March 23 suggesting another follow-up is due. The brand is at risk of going silent.
